title: Showing backlog and sprints of your choice

posts.author: nali (Nali)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am a new user of Monday and I haven’t managed to find the right way of filtering my table view.

We are using the backlog and sprint view in a slight different way than the usual agile method. My developers like to have a group that plans for the next 3 months and we pull items from the backlog in there. The issue is I can’t actually filter on that specific group AND my backlog. It either shows specific sprints or all sprints + backlog.

Instead, I am looking to filter out all my done sprints from my view and only have my backlog plus my 3 month group planning.

Whenever I want to show my backlog + the sprints of my choosing, it doesn’t allow it. Or perhaps I don’t know how to do it.

Does anyone have tips for me?

posts.author: nali (Nali)
posts.cookedHtml: I solved this! Not sure how to close this down. Sorry moderators.
